# Camelia Korea

> Katalog of authentic Korean (K-beauty) skincare products, sold in Uzbekistan.
> Orders are taken over Telegram and by phone — there is no online checkout.
> Site language: Uzbek (Latin script).

## Pages

- [Landing / catalog](https://www.cameliakorea.com/): hero, how-to-order steps,
  product grid, "Tez orada" (upcoming products), contact CTA, footer.
- [Product detail](https://www.cameliakorea.com/product/): gallery, price,
  description, optional video link, Telegram order button.

## Notes for agents

- Pages are server-rendered, so a plain fetch of the URL returns the full HTML.
- Admin (`/admin`), seller (`/seller`), `/login` and `/api` are private and
  disallowed in robots.txt — do not crawl them.
- Prices are in Uzbek so'm (UZS). "Tugadi" = sold out, "Tez orada" = coming soon.
